text.title: AI-Assisted Lessons-Learned Synthesis Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example demonstrating the full pipeline from input signal through schema-valid output.

example.title: canonical-run
example.trace: retros=8 → hr_or_pii=false → human_editor='Jane Doe' → verbatim-citations-required → run pipeline
example.note: The artefact above conforms to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml and satisfies every rule in content/01-core-rules.xml. Use it as the calibration target for first-time runs.
